questions.question: Describe the main differences between Hadoop and RDBMS in terms of data storage and management. Provide at least two key differences.
questions.hint: Focus on scalability and data distribution

questions.question: What is the primary purpose of HDFS in a Hadoop cluster? Explain its architecture and how it ensures data durability and availability.
questions.hint: Focus on data replication and failure tolerance

questions.question: A Hadoop cluster is processing a large dataset using MapReduce. How would you manage resources and applications to optimize its performance? Include at least two strategies to achieve this.
questions.hint: Focus on resource allocation and job scheduling
